patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp
index bd225bcc0635..172b9e45d9b1 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/VectorCombine.cpp
@@ -1447,6 +1447,27 @@ static ScalarizationResult canScalarizeAccess(VectorType *VecTy, Value *Idx,
 
   unsigned IntWidth = Idx->getType()->getScalarSizeInBits();
   APInt Zero(IntWidth, 0);
+  // If the index type can't represent all values up to NumElements, then we
+  // can't construct the APInt for the check below. Return early to avoid
+  // the assertion.
+  if (!isUIntN(IntWidth, NumElements))
+    return ScalarizationResult::unsafe();
+
+  // If the index type can't represent all values up to NumElements, then any
+  // value of the index type is less than NumElements.
+  if (!isUIntN(IntWidth, NumElements))
+    return ScalarizationResult::safe();
+
+  // If the index type can't represent all values up to NumElements, then any
+  // value of the index type is less than NumElements.
+  if (!isUIntN(IntWidth, NumElements))
+    return ScalarizationResult::safe();
+
+  // If the index type can't represent all values up to NumElements, then any
+  // value of the index type is less than NumElements.
+  if (!isUIntN(IntWidth, NumElements))
+    return ScalarizationResult::safe();
+
   APInt MaxElts(IntWidth, NumElements);
   ConstantRange ValidIndices(Zero, MaxElts);
   ConstantRange IdxRange(IntWidth, true);
